positive: A stylized, abstract depiction of a mystical forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a group of delicate, bioluminescent floating mushrooms and whimsical, intertwined glowing vines that form elegant silhouettes against a deep sapphire blue and violet gradient sky. The foreground features minimal, stylized silhouettes of stylized deer and foxes drinking from a crystal-clear, gently curving stream. Use a clean, neo-gothic illustration style with high contrast, emphasizing deep blacks and glowing neon accents. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, ideal for a repeating, print-ready apparel graphic. Intricate line work, clean edges, crisp details, volumetric lighting, symmetrical, silhouette art.
